objective: Exercise the migration_plan_and_rollback_packet candidate template with a minimal valid instance.

sections.MIGRATION_INTENT: Plan migration from generic assistant-work routing to specialist-domain dispatch for UI, PR, queue, terminal, docs, release, and migration tasks.
sections.CURRENT_SCHEMA_OR_STATE: Assistant-work registry has candidate domains, agents, template specs, and dispatch simulations under current context.
sections.TARGET_SCHEMA_OR_STATE: Assistant-work registry gains exercised instance corpus and agent boot exercise evidence before any acceptance landing.
FORWARD_PLAN: create valid and rejection instances for each machine-checkable template spec
create agent boot dispatch exercises tied to valid instances
validate required sections and expected rejection failures
ROLLBACK_PLAN: remove template_instances and agent_boot_exercises candidate directories
remove focused test file for this packet
resume from G9 continuity bundle artifact
COMPATIBILITY_GATES: prior G9 spec files remain unchanged
TEST_AND_PROOF_PLAN: run focused pytest for template instances
run ION status and sandbox preflight checks
NON_CLAIMS: This is a migration plan candidate, not an executed migration.
No accepted registry or product law is changed.
No external execution authority is claimed.

proves: required section shape can be satisfied

non_claims: This instance is candidate current-context test data, not accepted template law.
This instance does not execute external tools or mutate production state.
